title: Voss's Pre-Dawn Sighting
description: Sergeant Voss, when pressed in private, states that he saw Lieutenant Farrow moving along the communication trench toward the forward wire staging area at approximately 04:00 — a full hour before Farrow's claimed position in the artillery dugout. Voss is specific: Farrow was carrying his map case and moving quickly, without a lantern, which Voss noted as unusual because the trench boards were icy and treacherous in the dark.
